ccel.title: ANF01. The Apostolic Fathers with Justin Martyr and Irenaeus

source.title: ANF01. The Apostolic Fathers with Justin Martyr and Irenaeus

title: XXXIX.

source.title: ANF01. The Apostolic Fathers with Justin Martyr and Irenaeus

verses.book: Fragments from the Lost Writings of Irenæus
verses.text: Christ, who was called the Son of God before the ages, was manifested in the fulness of time, in order that He might cleanse us through His blood, who were under the power of sin, presenting us as pure sons to His Father, if we yield ourselves obediently to the chastisement of the Spirit.

verses.book: Fragments from the Lost Writings of Irenæus
verses.text: And in the end of time He shall come to do away with all evil, and to reconcile all things, in order that there may be an end of all impurities.
